name: Bobs Burial
blurb: Bob spends his days grazing in the cow pen bear Castle Mud.

stages.description: While butchering a cow you hear a scream from the village nearby. A woman screaming hysterically about a lunatic that killed the village's beloved cow bob!

Robert says the trinket is a lockmaker's mark from a guild that fell two centuries ago. He thinks more relics might be tucked away in old chests scattered through the countryside. Bring him three relics of any kind.
